ValidationRule.description: If the invoice position contains a value >0, either the Position must be shown or the Group that the Position belongs to must be shown.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
PackageType__c <>"Group", InvoicePositionAmount__c >0, ShowPositionAmount__c = false, NOT(ISBLANK( PackageName__r.PackageSuperior__c ) ), InvoicePositionSuperior__r.ShowPositionAmount__c =false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If the Invoice Position with an Amount is not shown, the the Group Position it belongs to must be shown. Please correct the checkboxes. (INP015)
